title: Bricks Reforged
description:
*This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".*
 This Resource Pack changes the bricks of the game to be more consistent and good looking.
body:
This Resource Pack changes the bricks of the game to be more consistent and good looking.

----

 Bricks Reforged:
  - Bricks
  - Deepslate Bricks
  - End Stone Bricks
  - Mossy Stone Bricks
  - Mud Bricks
  - Nether Bricks
  - Polished Blackstone Bricks
  - Prismarine Bricks
  - Quartz Bricks
  - Red Nether Bricks
  - Stone Bricks

----

{**This is a part of a major minecraft Resource Pack who I am making who will be called "Minecraft Reforged".**}
